user_intent_preservation.original_goal: Implement 3-phase PWM motor control on KIT_A2G_TC387_5V_TFT (TC387) using GTM TOM1 with a unified high/low complementary PWM API, including center-aligned operation, hardware dead-time and minimum pulse, and the specified pins.
user_intent_preservation.functional_behavior: Generate synchronized, center-aligned 20 kHz PWM for 3 complementary phase pairs (U, V, W) on TOM1 using TOM1_CH0 as the master time base (cmuFxclk0). Outputs are complementary (CCX/COUTX both active high) with push-pull mode and pad driver cmosAutomotiveSpeed1. Apply 0.5 µs dead-time and 1.0 µs minimum pulse, and initialize duties to U=25%, V=50%, W=75% on pins: HS P00.3(TOM1_2), P00.5(TOM1_4), P00.7(TOM1_6); LS P00.2(TOM1_1), P00.4(TOM1_3), P00.6(TOM1_5).
user_intent_preservation.technical_approach: Use the unified high-level GTM PWM driver IfxGtm_Pwm to configure a synchronized 3-phase complementary PWM cluster on TOM1 with TOM1_CH0 as the time-base at cmuFxclk0. Enable GTM and CMU clocks, configure center-aligned mode and frequency, map TOM1 outputs to P00.2–P00.7 via IfxGtm_PinMap_setTomTout with pushPull and cmosAutomotiveSpeed1, and set complementary output behavior with dead-time/min-pulse handled by the unified driver. Apply initial U/V/W duty cycles using IfxGtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDutyImmediate, then start all outputs synchronously.

driver_selection.selection_rationale: Unified high-level GTM PWM fits advanced multi-channel synchronized complementary PWM with dead-time and center-aligned operation; it is available in the template and supports TC3xx. It abstracts TOM/DTM handling while allowing sync updates and frequency control.

runtime_function.name: GTM_TOM_3_Phase_Inverter_PWM_updateUVW
runtime_function.purpose: Apply updated duty cycles for U, V, W phases synchronously while preserving complementary outputs and dead-time.

driver_changes: Replaced IfxGtm_Tom_PwmHl with unified IfxGtm_Pwm to satisfy hardware dead-time/min-pulse and multi-channel sync using a single high-level API.

api_changes.reason: Ensure precise 20 kHz after time-base setup
Program 0.5 µs dead-time via unified driver (DTM handled internally)

migration_notes.context_preserved: The solution keeps TOM1 with CH0 as master at cmuFxclk0, center-aligned complementary PWM with active-high CCX/COUTX, enforces dead-time and min pulse, uses the exact requested pins (P00.2..P00.7) in push-pull with cmosAutomotiveSpeed1, and initializes duties to 25/50/75%. Unified IfxGtm_Pwm maintains the original high/low complementary intent while leveraging template-available APIs.
